formal_rule_source: ChatGPT project File Library unique filename containing CURRENT_唯一正式规则

formal_governance_runtime.policy: Final artifacts report formal rule authority from active governance while preserving the validated underlying implementation version separately for auditability.

conditional_allocation_challenger.invariant: preserve final calibrated total-goals marginal within floating-point tolerance
conditional_allocation_challenger.unpromoted_competitions_policy: All competitions without an explicit valid competition-specific receipt remain formal_weight=0.

market_coordination_runtime.objective: minimize KL(q||prior) subject to synchronized non-redundant market constraints
market_coordination_runtime.formal_probability_mutation_gate: competition- and season-specific validated LOMO receipt
market_coordination_runtime.candidate_without_lomo_policy: 真实KL优化运行并记录先验、约束、目标函数、迭代、收敛、残差和概率守恒；模块状态部分通过；候选权重0；正式矩阵保持不变。

total_goals_peak_diagnostics.policy: If final total-goals Top-1 minus Top-2 is below 2 percentage points, label as 峰值平台/弱Top-1. Diagnostic is read-only and may never manufacture or redistribute probability mass.

dynamic_strength_challenger.policy: Historical validation does not activate live probability weight. Current-season sample gates and a competition/season hash-bound promotion receipt remain mandatory.

historical_market_lomo_chain.question_time_snapshot_policy: A complete synchronized tradable current snapshot may run an auditable market-coordination candidate. It cannot mutate the formal probability centre or activate formal EV without a competition- and season-specific validated LOMO/OOS receipt.
historical_market_lomo_chain.formal_data_blocker: No competition currently has acquired timestamped complete historical 1X2/AH/OU surfaces sufficient for production LOMO validation. The mapped primary backfill route is credential-gated.

runtime_capabilities: preserve complete official XI as observed
preserve source-backed predicted XI as predicted only
compute probable Top-11 from strictly prior same-season observed XIs plus point-in-time availability when executable inputs exist
downgrade bare probable status without executable XI inputs
probabilistic_lineup_route.numeric_effect_policy: Lineup projection can affect evidence status and confidence gating only. It cannot change formal score probabilities until competition-specific chronological OOF validation and promotion.

total_tail_challenger_v470.reason: Evidence is promising for USA_MLS but this module is not a registered formal V4.7 challenger in CURRENT; any formal use requires a future complete CURRENT upgrade.

v480_direct_total_distribution_research.conclusion: The direct categorical 0-7+ replacement family did not produce any competition that cleared the strict first-stage Champion comparison. No V4.8 total-probability upgrade is justified by this research round.
v480_direct_total_distribution_research.policy: No V4.8 research result may alter V4.7 formal probabilities without a complete future CURRENT upgrade and independent promotion evidence.

activation_policy: V4.7.0 governance and competition independence remain formally active. USA_MLS 2026 conditional_allocation_v470 remains hash-bound and active after the current actionable-runner re-sign and smoke PASS. Complete synchronized question-time 1X2/AH/OU now runs a genuine audited KL market-coordination candidate using a non-redundant three-market constraint basis; without a validated competition/season LOMO receipt the candidate remains formal_weight=0 and the formal matrix is unchanged. Formal EV remains unavailable because the current production LOMO receipt count is 0. Probable-lineup projection is runtime-active for auditable XI evidence but has formal probability effect weight 0. Final artifacts report V4.7.0 as rule authority while preserving V4.6.x implementation metadata separately. All unpromoted competitions and challengers remain fail-closed at formal_weight=0 unless separately promoted.
